info.title: Markdown Converter (Independent Publisher)
info.description: A comprehensive markdown converter that supports transformations to various formats including HTML, JSON, XML, and many more.

post.description: Converts Markdown content to HTML format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).

Converts Markdown content to a structured JSON format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).

Converts Markdown content to XML format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).

Converts Markdown content to plain text format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).

Converts Markdown tables to CSV format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).

Converts Markdown content to LaTeX format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).

Converts Markdown content to Microsoft Adaptive Card JSON format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).

adaptiveCard.description: The Adaptive Card output as JSON.

post.description: Converts Markdown content to YAML format with enhanced features (including math/TeX support, task lists, footnotes, embedded content, reference links, fenced divs, strikethrough, highlighting, subscript, superscript, and emoji support).
Converts Markdown content to email-friendly HTML format.
Converts Markdown content to SVG format.
Converts Markdown content to RSS format.
Converts Markdown content to wiki markup format.
Converts Markdown content to PNG image format.

pngBase64.description: The PNG image in Base64 encoding.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the output.

post.description: Converts Markdown content to log format.
Converts Markdown content to metrics format.

Converts and formats Markdown content to a README style format.
Converts and formats Markdown content to a changelog format.

post.summary: Convert Markdown to Table of Contents
post.description: Extracts headings from Markdown content and generates a table of contents.
Converts Markdown content to HTML with custom CSS styling.
